description: EDEN Greenhouse Lambda tools — custom tools for the Martian greenhouse agent, served as a single Lambda gateway target.

tools.name: eden___read_sensors
tools.description: Read current sensor telemetry from all greenhouse zones. Returns temperature (C), humidity (%), CO2 (ppm), light (PAR umol/m2/s), soil moisture (%), pH, EC (mS/cm), and water level (L) for each zone. Used by the agent to assess current greenhouse state before making decisions.

zone_id.description: Optional zone filter. One of: 'zone-a', 'zone-b', 'zone-c', 'zone-d', or omit to read all zones.

sensor_types.description: Optional filter for specific sensor types. Omit to return all sensor readings.

tools.name: eden___run_simulation
tools.description: Run a Virtual Farming Lab simulation with a given scenario and one or more strategies. Simulates crop growth, resource consumption, and outcomes over a specified number of sols. Returns projected yields, resource usage, crop health trajectories, and risk scores for each strategy. Used by the Dreamer (L3) layer for Monte Carlo planning.

start_sol.description: Sol number when the scenario event begins.

duration_sols.description: How many sols to simulate from start_sol.

strategies.description: List of response strategies to compare. Each is simulated independently against the same scenario.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions the agent would take.

value.description: Numeric parameter for the action (interpretation depends on action type).

monte_carlo_runs.description: Number of Monte Carlo iterations per strategy. Higher = more accurate but slower. Default: 100.

tools.name: eden___calculate_triage
tools.description: Calculate salvageability scores for crops under given crisis conditions. Returns a ranked list of crops by salvageability (0-1), caloric value at risk, days to harvest, water cost to save, and a recommended action (save/sacrifice/monitor). Used by L1 Triage Reflexes for rapid crisis response with human-cost awareness.

crisis_type.description: Type of crisis driving the triage.

available_resources.description: Current available resources for triage decisions.

crops.description: Crops to evaluate. If omitted, evaluates all currently growing crops.

tools.name: eden___mars_transform
tools.description: Transform Earth-baseline sensor values and agricultural parameters to Mars-adjusted values. Accounts for Mars gravity (0.38g), atmospheric pressure (610 Pa), higher radiation, reduced solar irradiance (43% of Earth), and temperature extremes. Returns adjusted values with correction factors applied.

earth_values.description: Earth-baseline values to transform. Keys are parameter names, values are numbers.

sol_number.description: Current sol number (1-450). Affects seasonal and orbital adjustments.

include_factors.description: If true, include the individual correction factors in the response alongside transformed values. Default: false.
